title: RapiDoc Slots
description: Named slots available in the rapi-doc web component where custom HTML content can be injected at predefined locations within the documentation UI.

logo.description: Slot for a custom logo image displayed in the navigation header.

header.description: Slot for custom header content placed in the header bar area.

footer.description: Slot for custom footer content placed at the bottom of the documentation.

nav-logo.description: Slot for a custom logo in the navigation sidebar.

overview.description: Slot for custom content displayed in the API overview/info section.

servers.description: Slot for custom content in the servers section.

auth.description: Slot for custom content in the authentication section.

tag--{tag-name}.description: Dynamic slot for injecting custom content before a specific tag group, where {tag-name} is the tag's name in lowercase with spaces replaced by hyphens.

endpoint--{method}--{path}.description: Dynamic slot for injecting custom content before a specific endpoint.
